info.description: The bijux-canon-index HTTP API exposes the v1 surface for deterministic and bounded vector execution. It separates capability discovery, artifact materialization, and query execution so operators can review the contract they are invoking before they ship it.
info.summary: Contract-driven vector execution and replayable retrieval.
info.title: bijux-canon-index API

post.description: Freeze the current corpus and vector state into an execution artifact with a declared contract so later executions can be audited and replayed.

error.message: [INV-000] Deterministic execution requires a deterministic vector store
error.remediation: Use deterministic inputs or switch to non_deterministic contract with declared randomness.

get.description: Return artifact identifiers known to the current backend so operators can inspect or reuse previously materialized execution state.
Report the active execution backend, supported contracts, storage backends, vector store capabilities, and ANN readiness in one envelope.

post.description: Create a logical corpus entry before ingestion. The endpoint is intentionally small so teams can separate naming and governance from later content writes.

error.message: [INV-000] Deterministic execution requires a deterministic vector store
error.remediation: Use deterministic inputs or switch to non_deterministic contract with declared randomness.

post.description: Execute a deterministic or bounded retrieval request against a materialized artifact and return the result identifiers plus replay metadata.

error.message: [INV-000] Deterministic execution requires a deterministic vector store
error.remediation: Use deterministic inputs or switch to non_deterministic contract with declared randomness.

post.description: Resolve a result identifier back to the document, chunk, vector, and execution context that produced it.

error.message: [INV-000] Deterministic execution requires a deterministic vector store
error.remediation: Use deterministic inputs or switch to non_deterministic contract with declared randomness.

post.description: Persist documents and either supplied vectors or embedding-derived vectors, then return the ingest count and resolved correlation identifier.

error.message: [INV-000] Deterministic execution requires a deterministic vector store
error.remediation: Use deterministic inputs or switch to non_deterministic contract with declared randomness.

post.description: Replay a prior execution contract against the currently available artifact and report whether the replay stayed within the declared equivalence boundary.

error.message: [INV-000] Deterministic execution requires a deterministic vector store
error.remediation: Use deterministic inputs or switch to non_deterministic contract with declared randomness.

get.description: Return recorded run identifiers from the run store for audit, replay, or support workflows.

tags.description: Read-only endpoints that describe backend capabilities and inventory.
tags.name: Discovery

tags.name: Materialization
